A

addAssignment(Assignment) - Method in class Student
Adds an assignment to the student's list of assignments.
addCheckPoint(int, boolean) - Method in class Lab
Adds a checkpoint to the lab with the specified checkpoint number and completion status.
addQuestion(int, int, int) - Method in class Assignment
Adds a question to the assignment with the specified question number, points earned, and total possible points.
addStudent(Student) - Method in class Course
Adds a student to the course.
Assignment - Class in Unnamed Package
Abstract class representing an assignment in a course.
Assignment(String) - Constructor for class Assignment
Constructs an Assignment object with the specified name.

C

calculateGrade() - Method in class Assignment
Calculates the grade for the assignment based on the points earned and total possible points.
calculateGrade() - Method in interface Gradeable
Calculates the grade for the gradeable item.
Course - Class in Unnamed Package
This class represents a course with its CRN, course name, instructor, and a list of assignments.
Course(String, String) - Constructor for class Course
Constructs a Course object with the specified CRN, course name, and instructor.
Course(String, String, String) - Constructor for class Course
Constructs a Course object with the specified CRN, course name, and instructor.

E

equals(Object) - Method in class Student
Checks if this student is equal to another object based on their ID.

G

getAssignments() - Method in class Student
Returns the list of assignments the student has.
getCourseName() - Method in class Course
Returns the name of the course.
getCrn() - Method in class Course
Returns the CRN of the course.
getId() - Method in class Student
Returns the ID of the student.
getInstructor() - Method in class Course
Returns the name of the instructor for the course.
getName() - Method in class Assignment
Returns the name of the assignment.
getName() - Method in class Student
Returns the name of the student.
getPointsEarned() - Method in class GradePair
Returns the number of points earned.
getTotalPoints() - Method in class GradePair
Returns the total possible points.
giveFeedback(String) - Method in class Assignment
Mechanism for allowing feedback for the assignment.
giveFeedback(String) - Method in interface Gradeable
Mechanism for allowing feedback for the gradeable item.
Gradeable - Interface in Unnamed Package
Interface for gradeable items.
GradePair - Class in Unnamed Package
This class represents a number of points earned and the total possible points.
GradePair(int, int) - Constructor for class GradePair
Constructs a GradePair object with the specified points earned and total points.

H

hashCode() - Method in class Student
Returns the hash code for this student based on their ID.

L

Lab - Class in Unnamed Package
Lab class represents a lab assignment in a course.
Lab(String) - Constructor for class Lab
Constructs a Lab object with the specified name.

Q

Quest - Class in Unnamed Package
A quest is a type of assignment that represents a quiz or exam.
Quest(String) - Constructor for class Quest
Constructs a Quest object with the specified name, description, and grade pair.

S

setInstructor(String) - Method in class Course
Updates the instructor for the course.
Student - Class in Unnamed Package
Student class represents a student with an ID, name, and a list of courses they are enrolled in.
Student(String, String) - Constructor for class Student
Constructs a Student object with the specified ID and name.

T

toString() - Method in class Assignment
Returns a string representation of the assignment, including its name, calculated grade, and feedback.
toString() - Method in class Course
 
toString() - Method in class GradePair
Returns a string representation of the GradePair.
toString() - Method in class Lab
Returns a string representation of the Lab object, including the checkpoint information.
toString() - Method in class Student
Returns a string representation of the Student object.
